domain: Mongoose ACh-receptor point-mutation venom resistance — substitutions at positions 187/189/194 + N-glycosylation block alpha-neurotoxin binding while preserving receptor function.
specific_mechanism: Targeted point mutation of identified critical residues to disable toxin docking without disrupting normal function.
llm_application: RECEPTOR-MUTATE: targeted point modification of attention-Q/K projection weights at identified critical positions to BLOCK known jailbreak/adversarial-prompt attack signatures while preserving general attention function. Mutation operates on a small set of weight indices informed by adversarial-attack residue analysis.
novelty_claim: Antidote prunes harmful weights (deletion). ACH uses LLM-generated mutants for testing. Safety fine-tuning re-trains broadly. RECEPTOR-MUTATE differs by POINT-WISE TARGETED MUTATION of identified critical weight positions to block adversarial dock-sites without retraining or pruning.
